query:
INSERT INTO agencies (name, slug, agency_type, jurisdiction_name, jurisdiction_type, state, county, city, website_url, notes) VALUES
('Second Judicial District Court', 'second-judicial-district-court', 'court', 'Washoe County', 'county', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.washoecourts.com', 'Nevada state trial court of general jurisdiction for Washoe County'),
('Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'washoe-county-da', 'prosecutor', 'Washoe County', 'county', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.washoecounty.gov/da', 'Elected DA office responsible for criminal prosecution in Washoe County'),
('Washoe County Sheriff''s Office', 'washoe-county-sheriffs-office', 'law_enforcement', 'Washoe County', 'county', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.washoesheriff.com', 'Elected sheriff department providing law enforcement and jail operations for Washoe County'),
('Reno Police Department', 'reno-police-department', 'law_enforcement', 'City of Reno', 'city', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.reno.gov/government/departments/police-department', 'Municipal police department for the City of Reno'),
('Washoe County Public Defender', 'washoe-county-public-defender', 'public_defender', 'Washoe County', 'county', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.washoecounty.gov/publicdefender', 'Appointed defense counsel for indigent defendants in Washoe County'),
('Washoe County Alternate Public Defender', 'washoe-county-alternate-public-defender', 'public_defender', 'Washoe County', 'county', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', NULL, 'Conflict counsel office for cases where the Public Defender has a conflict of interest'),
('Washoe County Risk Management', 'washoe-county-risk-management', 'government_department', 'Washoe County', 'county', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.washoecounty.gov/riskmanagement', 'County department managing liability, workers comp, and insurance for Washoe County'),
('City of Reno', 'city-of-reno', 'municipality', 'City of Reno', 'city', 'Nevada', 'Washoe County', 'Reno', 'https://www.reno.gov', 'Municipal government of the City of Reno, Nevada'),
('Nevada Attorney General', 'nevada-attorney-general', 'state_agency', 'State of Nevada', 'state', 'Nevada', NULL, 'Carson City', 'https://ag.nv.gov', 'Statewide elected office responsible for legal representation of the State of Nevada'),
('Nevada Commission on Judicial Discipline', 'nevada-commission-on-judicial-discipline', 'oversight_body', 'State of Nevada', 'state', 'Nevada', NULL, 'Carson City', 'https://www.judcom.nv.gov', 'Independent state commission with authority to discipline Nevada judges');
